name: large room with tall ceiling
description: I'm in a large room with tall ceiling
hints: A large room with the merry-go-round, a steam calliope, and a blue button. Look up!
LOOK UP or LOOK CEIL to spot the catwalk above the ride. You need to get up there.
PRES BLUE to interact with the blue button. The calliope is very loud - it masks sounds.
To reach the catwalk: ride the merry-go-round, climb the pole on the horse, use the trampoline at the top to jump to the rope. S=fortune teller (room 23).

effects: Message: There's a catwalk above the ride
Message: There's a catwalk above the ride

notes: Main merry-go-round room with calliope and blue button. LOOK UP reveals catwalk above. The path to the catwalk is: ride horse -> climb pole -> use trampoline -> jump to rope. S=fortune teller (room 23).
